title: What Causes Belly Fat? (Hormones, Stress, Diet, and Lifestyle)
introduction: Belly fat causes are usually multi-factor: calorie surplus, low activity, sleep debt, stress, alcohol, and age-related body composition changes. This article explains what causes abdominal fat and how to reverse each driver.

sections.heading: Top Causes of Belly Fat Accumulation
sections.content:
| Belly Fat Cause | Mechanism |
| --- | --- |
| Chronic calorie surplus | Stores excess energy as fat |
| Low protein + low muscle stimulus | Poor body composition maintenance |
| Sedentary behavior | Lower daily energy output |
| Poor sleep and stress | Higher appetite and water retention |
| Alcohol excess | Additional calories + disrupted recovery |

Belly fat gain is usually a pattern, not one single food.

sections.heading: Hormones and Belly Fat: What Is True
sections.content:
Hormones influence fat distribution, but they do not replace energy balance.

• Cortisol can increase central fat retention pressure
• Insulin resistance can worsen appetite and fat partitioning
• Menopause/andropause can shift body-fat distribution

Related reads:
• [belly fat in women after 40](/blog/belly-fat-in-women-after-40)
• [belly fat in men over 40](/blog/belly-fat-in-men-over-40)

sections.heading: How to Remove the Root Causes
sections.content:
1) Set calorie targets with [calorie calculator](/tools/calorie-calculator)
2) Create deficit with [calorie deficit calculator](/tools/calorie-deficit-calculator)
3) Track intake with [meal log calculator](/tools/meal-log-calculator)
4) Keep protein high using [protein calculator](/tools/protein-calculator)

Text CTA: Use Eati to identify your specific belly-fat triggers (late-night intake, weekends, alcohol, low protein) from real logs.

midArticleCta: Track your daily intake and weekly waist trend in Eati to remove the specific causes of your belly fat gain.
conclusion: Belly fat is caused by repeatable behaviors and biology interactions, not bad luck. Once the true drivers are identified and tracked, abdominal fat reduction becomes much more predictable.
metaTitle: What Causes Belly Fat? Real Causes and How to Fix Them
metaDescription: Learn what causes belly fat: diet, stress, sleep, hormones, inactivity, and age. Plus practical fixes for abdominal fat reduction.

faqs.question: Does sugar specifically cause belly fat?
faqs.answer: Excess sugar can contribute to calorie surplus and poor satiety, which can increase belly fat over time, but total energy balance remains primary.
